resources.string: Add contact
Pair in person. One device shows an offer QR code; the other scans it and shows a response QR code.
Local contact name
The name stays on this device and is not included in the QR code.
Enter a local contact name.
Use a shorter name without control characters.
Show offer QR
Scan offer QR
Close
Cancel pairing
Done
Preparing protected pairing state…
Offer QR
Let the other person scan this QR code. Then scan the response shown on their device.
One-time CipherBoard pairing offer QR code
Scan response QR
Response QR
Let the first device scan this response. Compare both Safety Numbers before confirming.
One-time CipherBoard pairing response QR code
Scan offer QR
Scan response QR
Point the camera at the QR code shown by the other CipherBoard device.
Camera preview for pairing QR scan
Cancel scan
Camera access was not granted. CipherBoard requests it only when you choose to scan a pairing QR code.
The camera could not scan the QR code. Check camera permission and try again.
This is not a CipherBoard offer QR code.
This is not the expected CipherBoard response QR code.
Verify contact
Compare these values aloud or side by side. They must match exactly on both devices.
Safety Number
Emoji/word code
Do not confirm if either value differs. Cancel and begin again in person.
Values match — mark verified
Values match — store the new untrusted key
Critical warning: this contact now presents a different identity key. Do not treat it as trusted automatically.
Previous identity fingerprint
New identity fingerprint
Completing pairing stores the new session in a blocked state. Open contact details and compare the Safety Number again before explicitly trusting the new key.
Contact verified
The one-time pairing state was consumed and the contact session was stored in the encrypted Vault.
New identity not trusted
The replacement session was stored, but secure messages remain blocked. Open contact details, compare the Safety Number again in person, and explicitly trust the new identity.
Expires in approximately %1$s
Pairing could not be completed. Nothing was trusted; cancel and begin again.
The QR code is invalid, expired, already used, or belongs to another offer.
The in-memory pairing step was interrupted. Start again and use a new one-time QR code.
Vault locked
Unlock the Vault from the CipherBoard home screen before pairing.
Pair contact again
The previous session for %1$s has been destroyed. Complete a new two-way QR pairing and compare the new Safety Number in person.
This contact cannot be paired again from the current state. Return to contact details and destroy the old session first.
This device is already stored as another local contact. Open that contact and use its re-pair action instead.
